cast.name: Michael Wren Gucciardo
cast.character: Stockbroker in Snipers Scoop - Stock Exchange

plot outline: Despite his tarnished reputation after the events of The Dark Knight (2008), in which he took the rap for Dent's crimes, Batman feels compelled to intervene to assist the city and its Police force, which is struggling to cope with Bane's plans to destroy the city.
title: The Dark Knight Rises
akas: The Dark Knight Rises: The IMAX Experience (United States)

distributors.name: Columbia TriStar Warner Filmes de Portugal

other companies.name: The Trustees of Mehrangarh (Fort) Museum, Jodhpuur
